evidence.scientific_clarity: All four panels match the brief exactly: dominant pipeline diagram (A), 5-bar ablation (B), Baseline-vs-Ours loss curves (C), full-width 5×5 heatmap (D); gridspec(2,3,width_ratios=[2,1,1]) honored.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and svg.fonttype='none' set globally; pdffonts confirms Arial CID TrueType embedded (no Type 3); font stack prioritizes Arial/Helvetica over DejaVu Sans; sizes form a clear hierarchy (11pt labels → 8pt axes → 7pt ticks).
evidence.palette: Blue-family + neutral-grey palette is fully colorblind-safe (no red/green); sequential Blues colormap for directional heatmap; graded blues/greys for categorical ablation bars with clear full-model anchor.
evidence.layout_density: Tight margins (left=0.06, right=0.97, top=0.93, bottom=0.10); panel D spans full bottom row; panel B y-axis zoomed to data range; heatmap cells annotated with values; wspace/hspace moderate but appropriate for label clearance.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Baseline line color #D8D8D8 ('near-white grey') has very low contrast against a white background in panel C — a reviewer would flag this as barely legible; all other elements (bold panel labels, inside legend, honest single-run disclosure) are solid.
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdf.fonttype=42 set in rcParams; pdffonts output shows only 'GOFYPY+Arial-BoldMT' and 'GOFYPY+ArialMT' as CID TrueType with no Type 3 fonts; script includes automated pdffonts verification with sys.exit(2) on failure.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (42 KB), figure.png (271 KB, 3508×1698 px at 300 dpi), figure.svg (48 KB), caption.tex (739 B), and gen_figure.py (12 KB) all present and non-trivial; SVG is a bonus output beyond the brief's requirements.
evidence.caption_quality: Each panel explained with specific numerical findings: full model 64.7 vs. no-attention 58.2 (B); loss 0.19 lower than baseline (C); darker-blue encoding described for heatmap (D); honest caveat 'single-run; no error bars shown' included.

overall_strengths: Exemplary font hygiene: pdf.fonttype=42 enforced, Arial embedded as CID TrueType confirmed by pdffonts, with automated Type-3 guard in the script.
Caption is publication-ready: every panel has a specific numerical claim, visual encoding is explained, and limitations are disclosed.
overall_weaknesses: Baseline line in panel C uses #D8D8D8 ('near-white grey'), which has insufficient contrast against a white plot background and would likely draw a reviewer objection.
data.json is absent from the work directory, so the numerical claims in the caption (64.7, 58.2, −0.19) cannot be independently verified against the source data.
